channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. Jensen Huang says he would be 'deeply alarmed' if his $500,000 engineer did not consume at least $250,000 of tokens  Business Insider
  2. Nvidia's Huang pitches AI tokens on top of salary as agents reshape how humans work  CNBC
  3. Tokens may soon drive the AI economy  Financial Times
  4. Nvidia's Jensen Huang becomes one of the first CEOs to offer engineers ... as part of recruitment strategy  The Times of India
  5. AI tokens are becoming part of the reward in IT — a new trend in Silicon Valley  Dev.ua

item.title: SEC urged to restrict Chinese companies’ access to US capital markets - Financial Times
item.description:
1. SEC urged to restrict Chinese companies’ access to US capital markets  Financial Times
  2. Press Release: Senator John Kennedy and Banking Committee Colleagues Urge SEC to Address Risks Posed by China-Linked Companies  Quiver Quantitative
  3. Bipartisan lawmakers broaden China scrutiny following SEC task force launch  Pensions & Investments
  4. CPA Applauds Bipartisan Senate Banking Committee Letter Urging SEC to Crack Down on China’s Exploitation of U.S. Capital Markets  Coalition For A Prosperous America
  5. Sens. Urge SEC To Tackle China Exploit Of 'Opaque' Entities  Law360

item.title: Rivian sacrifices 2027 profit goal to push deeper into autonomy - TechCrunch
item.description:
1. Rivian sacrifices 2027 profit goal to push deeper into autonomy  TechCrunch
  2. Uber and Rivian plan to bring robotaxis to California  Los Angeles Times
  3. Uber to Buy Rivian Vehicles for Use as Driverless Taxis  The New York Times
  4. The Uber Technologies (UBER) Implosion: Why a 70% Valuation Haircut Is Closer Than You Think  Yahoo Finance
  5. Uber and Rivian Partner to Deploy up to 50,000 Fully Autonomous Robotaxis  Rivian

item.title: Why peak uncertainty about the Iran war signals a stock-market rally may be near - MarketWatch
item.description:
1. Why peak uncertainty about the Iran war signals a stock-market rally may be near  MarketWatch
  2. Wall Street again hopes for the best  Axios
  3. Don't panic, don't capitulate: investors try to see beyond Iran war  Reuters
  4. Iran Is Changing the Landscape for Stock Markets. What They Face After War and 5 Other Things to Know Today.  Barron's
  5. Stocks recover from war shock as Wall Street sniffs a turning point  Los Angeles Times

item.title: Why it’s so hard for world leaders to bring down oil and gasoline prices - NPR
item.description: Why it’s so hard for world leaders to bring down oil and gasoline prices  NPRView Full Coverage on Google News
